content: Prisma schema defines warehouse, booking, pricing, company, user, location. Key relations: warehouse has many bookings, company owns warehouses, bookings link to users.
Warebnb: Next.js 16 with React 19, Prisma ORM, Supabase (auth + DB), Zustand state, Tailwind CSS, Radix UI components. Node 24, TypeScript.
Warehouse marketplace platform with booking system, 10% deposits, QR-based pallet tracking with photo verification, real-time chat, Stripe payments, and admin dashboard
